text:

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL/TRIM candidate at -28.42% due to its leveraged nature and current status. SPAL is also a NEW position at -23.94% and needs attention.

Watch: ANET shows a strong scanner setup (9/12) with an entry around 183.64.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching for clear setups in tech.
plays: SOXL: TRIM. Status is SELL, down -28.42%. Consider reducing exposure.
SPAL: TRIM. Status is NEW, down -23.94%. Re-evaluate this leveraged position.
